text:
There once was a bunny who had an endless summer. Every day she would hop away from her cozy burrow into colorful forests. There she'd discover playful puppies chasing butterflies, rivers that shimmered like jewels, and mountains that whispered secrets into the gentle wind. Each morning was a new adventure. 

One day, while exploring, she happened upon a peculiar-looking seed. Intrigued, she tucked it into her fluffy coat. Back home, she planted it in her tiny backyard garden. Days passed. The seed sprouted into a magnificent oak tree. 

Each autumn, the oak would shed its leaves like a gentle cloak. But from its branches hung thousands of smaller seeds. Every little breeze carried these tiny treasures far and wide.

Years stretched into decades. The bunny watched as those tiny oak seeds blossomed into a myriad of trees. Their leaves changed hues every season, telling tales of the many creatures who lived beneath them.
